content.en:
The Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son Project ended, and the Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs left with the Children of those Eras.

Soon after, all the races in the universe also left one by one, and the Kunwu Supreme also left ahead of schedule with Ye Tian alone, and hid his breath, and returned to the Terran territory by another route, sparing a lot of roads.

The Kunwu Supreme did this for fear of being intercepted by the Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Eras.

After all, this time Ye Tian made the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes lose face, and also made those sons of the era lose the opportunity to become the gods of the ten thousand worlds, although there was still a harvest and a lot of luck, but it was not proportional to the gain.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme to return to the human race.

As soon as he came back, Ye Tian and Kunwu Supreme talked about the Great Destruction of the Universe.

"Kunwu Supreme, did the Supreme of the Twelve Cosmic Epochs reveal the secret of the Great Destruction of the Universe?" Ye Tian asked.

"It's revealed!" Kunwu Supreme said, "Consistent with your previous guess, they have reached the thirteenth universe era through reincarnation!"

Immediately, the Kunwu Supreme told the secrets of reincarnation, reincarnation treasure, and the new universe era one by one.

After listening, Ye Tian frowned: "Kunwu Supreme, how do I think they are hiding something, if all this is done by the Lord of the Yuan Gu, could it be that he left a legacy, is it really just to let the Supremes of the twelve universe epochs live another cosmic era? If the supreme of a force discovers that the reincarnation treasure can be reincarnated in the current cosmic era, he will definitely bring his relatives, even if the number of places is limited, he will not give it to other supremes, and will only take his relatives to live another cosmic era. Besides, the Supremes of the twelve cosmic epochs are all united, which is a bit abnormal. If there is no common interest, how can the forces of the twelve cosmic epochs be united?"

"Yes, so the Lord of the Yuan Gu is definitely hiding some important secrets, and the only clue now is the so-called inheritance. There are indeed strong people from the chaos in the universe, most of them are a strong man who touched this universe and threw some inheritances into it, and I once got a inheritance. Therefore, it is very likely that the inheritance of the strong man said by the Lord of the Yuan Gu is true, if we find the inheritance of that person, we may know what secrets the Lord of the Yuan Gu is hiding!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"If you can capture a supreme, maybe you can directly interrogate the secret!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"That's too difficult!" Kungo Supreme shook his head, "Those Supremes are extremely powerful, and the weakest Supremes among them may be more powerful than me, once they attack the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras, it will be tantamount to war, and the consequences are not something that a single clan can bear." "

Ye Tian nodded secretly, with the strength of the various races in the universe today, it was indeed not suitable for war.

If nothing else, such as the Lord of the Yuan Gu, it is estimated that there is no supreme who is his opponent.

If it weren't for the supreme beings such as the Lord of the Yuan Gu who were suppressed by the origin of the universe, otherwise the Lord of the Yuan Gu alone would be enough to sweep away all the supremes.

"Ye Tian, grow up as soon as possible, I always feel that something big will happen in the near future!"

Kunwu Supreme said with emotion.

"Kungo Supreme, I will!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

After leaving the Kunwu Palace, Ye Tian returned to the Holy City Heavenly Pavilion.

This time, the Ten Thousand Worlds Divine Son plan made Ye Tian gain a lot, but it also made Ye Tian a little pressured.

These pressures did not come from those sons of the era, although those sons of the era were very powerful, and there might be sons of the era who were more powerful than Ling Wu, but what really made Ye Tian jealous was those supremes.

No one knows what the purpose of those supremes is, and perhaps in the near future, war will break out.

At that time, will the Terrans be able to withstand the attacks of those supremes?

In the following days, Ye Tian basically stayed in the Holy City to cultivate.

Not long ago, he had cultivated the fifth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to the late stage of Dacheng, and the limit of what his physical body could improve now was still very long, and he could continue to improve his physical strength.

Therefore, he planned to focus on improving his physical strength next, and by the way, he would impact the consummation realm of the fifth layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

It will take time!

Time has passed year by year, and in the blink of an eye, it is 10,000 years.

For ordinary people, 10,000 years is a long time, a distant time, but for a cultivator like Ye Tian, 10,000 years is nothing at all.

In the past 10,000 years, the speed of Tiange's development has far surpassed that of other forces, and many galaxy-level, galaxy-level, and even several cosmic gods have been born.

Among them, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu have stepped into the combat power of the cosmic gods, and they are all very powerful cosmic gods.

And the Bright Moon Fairy who joined the Heavenly Pavilion had reached the peak realm of the Cosmic God.

this day.

The Bright Moon Fairy came to Ye Tian's face.

Ye Tian saw Fairy Mingyue coming, and said, "Fairy Mingyue, are you here to say goodbye?"

At the beginning, the condition of his deal with the Flame Heavenly Venerable was to let the Bright Moon Fairy serve the Heavenly Pavilion for 10,000 years, and the Bright Moon Fairy did his best to refine weapons in the 10,000 years that he became the chief refiner of the Heavenly Pavilion, and the Heavenly Pavilion developed and grew so fast, the Bright Moon Fairy had at least half of the credit.

In addition, the Bright Moon Fairy has also been successfully promoted to the Supreme Treasure level Divine Master not long ago, and has been able to refine ordinary Divine Treasures, but the success rate is not too high, and it can be regarded as the threshold for just entering the Supreme Treasure Divine Master.

But even so, the status of the Bright Moon Fairy is higher than that of many masters.

If he could, Ye Tian naturally hoped that the Bright Moon Fairy would stay for a few more years.

It's a pity that the time he agreed with Agni Tianjiao was 10,000 years.

After 10,000 years, the Bright Moon Fairy could leave the Heavenly Pavilion, and he couldn't stop it.

"Pavilion Master, I'm not here to say goodbye, I want to continue to stay in the Heavenly Pavilion!" said Fairy Mingyue.

"Why?"

Ye Tian was both surprised and a little curious.

It stands to reason that the Bright Moon Fairy can completely leave the Heavenly Pavilion and return to the Agni Heavenly Palace, and in the future, he can become one of the high-level of the Agni Heavenly Palace, or even the deputy palace master.

After all, the Flame Heavenly Palace was a Heavenly Venerable-level power, far from being comparable to the current Heavenly Pavilion.

Fairy Mingyue said truthfully: "Pavilion Master, I want to continue to stay in the attic, I think the Heavenly Pavilion is more suitable for me, here I can give full play to my refining level, although for the time being, I am not as fast as in the Flame Heavenly Palace." But I believe that in the future, the Heavenly Pavilion will definitely become a force above the Flame Heavenly Palace, so I don't want to give up this opportunity!"

"Does the Flame Heavenly Venerable know what you're thinking?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Ancestor knows!" Fairy Mingyue said, "Before I came, I discussed with Ancestor, and he agreed with my decision!"

Ye Tian was silent for a moment, and then said, "Okay, then you will stay in the Heavenly Pavilion from now on!"

"Thank you, Pavilion Master!"

Bright Moon Fairy said.
